英國英格蘭越可爾馬福利特
zh.Marfleet, Holderness, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾馬福利特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Thorpe IV於1260年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾馬福利特時，他的父親Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet30歲，母親Agnes Saint Quintin27歲。他於大約1289年與Alice d'Oyry在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1310年在英國享年51歲。

英国英格兰越可爾馬福利特
zh-hans.Marfleet, Holderness, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾馬福利特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen de Thorpe IV于1260年出生在英国英格兰越可爾馬福利特时，他的父亲Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet30岁，母亲Agnes Saint Quintin27岁。他于大约1289年与Alice d'Oyry在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1310年在英国享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Thorpe IV was born in 1260, in Marfleet, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Saint Quintin, was 27. He married Alice d'Oyry about 1289, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1310, in England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen de Thorpe IV est né en 1260, à Marfleet, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Saint Quintin, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice d'Oyry environ 1289, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1310, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen de Thorpe IV 1260 in Marfleet, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Saint Quintin 27. Er hat um 1289 in Yorkshire, England Alice d'Oyry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1310 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Thorpe IV è nato il nel 1260 nel Marfleet, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Saint Quintin, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice d'Oyry circa 1289, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1310, nel England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Marfleet, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアマルフリート
イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマルフリート
ja.Marfleet, Holderness, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマルフリート
ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Thorpe IVが1260年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマルフリートで生まれた時，父Stephen de Thorpe III de Merfletは30歳，母Agnes Saint Quintinは27歳であった。約1289年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice d'Oyryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1310年にイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Thorpe IV(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 마플릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Saint Quintin(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 요르크실르에서 Alice d'Oyry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1310년 영국에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

Marfleet, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Marfleet, Holderness, Yorkshire, England: Marfleet, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Thorpe IV nasceu em 1260, em Marfleet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Saint Quintin, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice d'Oyry aproximadamente 1289, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1310, em Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Thorpe IV родился в 1260 г. в местности марфлит, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Saint Quintin, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice d'Oyry около 1289 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1310 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen de Thorpe IV nació en 1260, en Marfleet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen de Thorpe III de Merflet, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Saint Quintin, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice d'Oyry aproximadamente 1289, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1310, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
